caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pompadour hairstyle, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a black microphone. In the background, walls are adorned with framed photographs and clothing displays, including a garment labeled "LEE". On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners of the frames; one side displays a logo with the text "PODCAST", while the other side shows a red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man begins to speak, shifting his facial expression from a neutral look to a slight smile while looking toward someone off-camera. His head tilts slightly as he engages in conversation, while the surrounding studio equipment and background elements remain static.
